svg.text: Channel Configuration — full flow & on-screen text (channel-wise)
Grid columns & values · Add-channel catalog · Every step and all title / subtitle / verify / guide text shown per channel. Annotate with real data, then re-implement.
A · Channel list & profiles grid (what columns show + values)

g.text: Classic / Vibrant style · List / Card view ·
Account Type: Owned, Public · Status: Active,
Messages, User Posts, Visitor Posts, Mentions,
first 2 type chips + "+N more" — OR alert: "Data

svg.text: B · Add-channel catalog & flow type per channel

text.tspan: Choose → Connection type → [OWNED: Authenticate → (Select accounts*) → Review] OR [PUBLIC: Add public source → Review] (*if pages)

svg.text: C · Per-channel steps — every on-screen title, subtitle, verify & guide text

svg.text: Generated from channel-data.ts + add-channel-wizard. Text shown verbatim (with {channel} resolved). Branches for "choice" channels both shown. Demo page list comes from FACEBOOK_PAGES.
